title: PROJECT: ERASMUS+ EXCHANGE PROGRAMMES FOR STUDIES AND INTERNSHIPS  2023-1-TR01-KA131-HED-00011869
content:
Announcements

Details

Dear Students,

ERASMUS+ Language Exam consists of two parts (written and speaking). Students are required to attend both sessions. Written Exam will be administered online on Thursday, April 27, 2023.

1

. Written Exam (75%): April 27, 2023 at 11:00-12.35 douonlineydb.dogus.edu.tr

2

. Speaking Exam (25%): April 28, 2023 at 13:30 (Duration:10 minutes for each student)

Microsoft Teams The Written Exam will be available at douonlineydb.dogus.edu.tr at 11:00 am. Students are required to approve the PDP LAW INFORMATION and CONSENT TEXTS on the system to start the exam.

ERASMUS+ Speaking Exam will be administered on MS Teams on 28 April 2023 Friday. Students are required to be online on MS Teams at 13:30.

The appointment lists for Speaking Exam will be announced on DOU website on 27 April 2023. You need to be online on MS Teams and wait for the examiner’s call within the time slot you were allotted to. You will be invited to the exam anytime during the specified slot written next to your student number on the Speaking Exam appointment lists. Students who have problems with their computers can also take the exam on their mobile phones by downloading MS Teams application. Students must have a valid ID with photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam.

If you have any questions, you can contact us at

[email protected]

Good Luck!

Paylaş
